markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 66. Houston Pilots Licensing & Regul. Act
##### § 66.020 — Rule or Rate Change

(a) The board shall give at least 10 days’ notice as provided by this section before the board adopts a rule or changes a pilotage rate.

(b) The board shall post the notice and a copy of the proposed rule or change at the board office for public inspection.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The board shall give at least 10 days’ notice as provided by this section before the board adopts a rule or changes a pilotage rate.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The board shall post the notice and a copy of the proposed rule or change at the board office for public inspection.
